title: IBKR RTMD Config
description: Venue-specific configuration for the IBKR RTMD adaptor.

mode.description: IBKR connection mode. This is metadata for operator intent; host and port still determine the actual TWS or IB Gateway endpoint.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the target TWS or IB Gateway session.

port.description: TCP port of the target TWS or IB Gateway session.

client_id.description: IBKR API client ID used for the RTMD session.

read_only.description: RTMD adaptor safety default. Present for parity with the shared IBKR config model.

max_msg_rate.description: Sustained outbound message rate limit in messages per second.

reconnect_delay_s.description: Initial reconnect backoff delay in seconds.

reconnect_max_delay_s.description: Maximum reconnect backoff delay in seconds.

next_valid_id_timeout_s.description: Timeout in seconds waiting for the nextValidId handshake after connect.
